final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster (Xiaohongshu / RedNote 9-grid cover image) for a grassroots creator media account called "小书素人媒体", featuring the DJI Pocket 4 camera.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu (小红书) grassroots / "素人" UGC aesthetic — warm, casual, slightly handcrafted feel; flat-ish illustration mixed with lifestyle photo collage elements; NOT polished brand advertising
Composition: vertical 9-grid-style single-panel cover layout (portrait), central title text as the dominant focal point, DJI Pocket 4 product subtly visible in the background or lower portion, generous breathing room around text
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 compact gimbal camera as the featured product, presented in a natural lifestyle context suggesting a first-hands-on unboxing or first-use moment
Scene/backdrop: soft neutral or pastel background evoking a cozy desk or lifestyle flat-lay, consistent with 小红书 素人 creator aesthetic
Lighting/mood: bright, airy, approachable — natural soft window light feel, warm and inviting, no dramatic shadows
Color palette: warm pastel tones (cream, blush, soft mint or lavender) as base; one accent color to highlight the title text; overall palette feels personal and non-corporate
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验" — centered, dominant, displayed in a cute and differentiated hand-lettering or rounded bubbly font style that feels playful and personal, NOT standard system fonts
Materials/textures: subtle paper or linen texture on background; slight sticker or washi-tape decorative elements optional to reinforce 素人 DIY feel
Constraints: layout must read clearly as a Xiaohongshu cover thumbnail; title text "大强pocket4初体验" must be legible at small size; overall impression must feel like a real grassroots creator post, not a brand ad
Avoid: corporate slick advertising look, dark moody lighting, overly complex illustration, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer sharpness, watermarks
